pages.text: $(term)Essence Fusion$() uses one essence metal as its catalyst, then gathers every essence it restrains to produce another copy of that catalyst metal.

pages.title: Any Essence Catalyst
pages.text: Drop the essence you want to produce into the catalyst slot. The HUD shows every essence it restrains or doubly restrains. Fill the displayed set completely.

pages.title: Fusion
pages.text: When every required kind is present, fusion begins. All input essences are consumed and the transformation output receives the catalyst essence.$(br2)Metals with broader restraint need more ingredients. Pandemonium restrains all other eleven, so its fusion demands all eleven.

pages.title: Polarity
pages.text: The crucible's $(term)polarity$() normally ranges from -50 to 50 and begins at 0. The outer pointer on the upper-right HUD dial shows its current value.$(br2)Symbiosis raises polarity by 2; mutual restraint lowers it by 2. Other essence relations and fusion leave it unchanged.

pages.title: A Broken Balance
pages.text: $(warn)Take care:$() above +50, the crucible becomes a redstone block; below -50, it becomes an alchemical dross block. The contents drop, but the crucible is lost.
Polarity becomes a recipe condition in scroll alchemy. Practice adjusting it before attempting the Great Work.
